scenarios.name: Layer 4 operational workspace
assertions: An incubation workspace can exist without a Layer 5 artifact.
Operational bodies remain explicit about anchor identity and workflow state.

scenarios.name: External reference handling
assertions: External references can remain Layer 4 operational material.
The system does not force external references into Git canon.

scenarios.name: Revision-aware artifact knowledge
assertions: Layer 4 slices link back to explicit artifact revisions.

scenarios.name: Canonical truth boundary
assertions: Layer 5 remains the canonical publication surface.
Operational slices do not replace publication truth.

scenarios.name: Re-ingestion loop
assertions: Stale support can be detected after canonical changes.

scenarios.name: Bottom-up canonical reprocessing
assertions: After promotion, Layer 5 acts as the canonical source.
Meaningful canonical revision can trigger Layer 4 re-ingestion and Layer 3 reconciliation.

non_goals: Treating Layer 4 as the publication source of truth
Copying full artifacts into Layer 3 durable memory
Forcing every Layer 4 record into Git canon
